problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
